data.revised_prompt:
Create a clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet for a controllable player character, arranged as exactly a 2x2 grid with four equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Solid flat chroma-key background #FF00FF magenta only, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no cast shadow, no borders, no visible grid lines, no text.

Character: Samsara Ascension jade-white female xianxia cultivator, elegant young cultivator, long dark ink hair, one jade-and-gold hair ornament, small forehead gem, white and pale-jade robes with light gold trim, a few translucent teal ribbons, slim jade sword kept close to the body. Clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG asset, crisp silhouette, simplified readable costume, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art.

Framing: full body visible in every cell, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered, same body height and same pixel scale in all frames, feet/bottom anchor line stable, subject fills about 60–65% of each cell, generous margins, nothing crosses cell edges. Entire character including sword, hair, sleeves, ribbons, robe hem, and any tiny attached qi accent must fit fully within each cell.

Action: idle loop with real pose changes. Frame 1 (top-left): calm neutral stance, feet planted, sword lowered close to side, relaxed shoulders. Frame 2 (top-right): visible breathing inhale, chest and shoulders lift, robe sleeves rise slightly, teal ribbons float upward. Frame 3 (bottom-left): qi gathers at the hands and sword hilt, knees soften, hair and ribbons sway to the side, compact attached qi accent only near the body. Frame 4 (bottom-right): exhale and settle back to the original stance, aura dims, robe hem falls; loop naturally returns to frame 1.

Animation constraints: preserve exact same character identity, costume colors, face/eyes, hair ornament, robe palette, sword design, and material language in every cell; only body pose, clothing motion, hair/ribbon motion, and compact attached qi accent may change. No projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no dust cloud, no detached effects outside the main silhouette.
